title: short story /game thought
snippet: How about a story like frequency movie where we have a mode of communication between past and present most likely through light waves . and protagonist tries to correct the mistakes of past and present from both ends.

title: Capitalism through ads
snippet: news sharing tv channels turned into an ad showing privately funded propaganda agencies. unlike the old times they dont hold any social responsibility , no accountability , just full time propaganda. On the online space we are made to pay f
